CVE-2024-21535.title: Versions of the package markdown-to-jsx before 7.4.0 are vulnerab ...
CVE-2024-21535.description: Versions of the package markdown-to-jsx before 7.4.0 are vulnerable to Cross-site Scripting (XSS) via the src property due to improper input sanitization. An attacker can execute arbitrary code by injecting a malicious iframe element in the markdown.
